---

**Key Timeline Summary:**

```
Feb 2026 (end)   → Brent at $72/bbl (pre-war)
March 2026       → War starts; Strait closes; 10 mb/d supply loss; Brent hits $118/bbl
Early April 2026 → Ceasefire announced; Brent moderates to $90s
April 20, 2026   → Data cutoff for this report
May 2026         → BASELINE: acute disruptions end
2026Q2           → Record oil deficit of 3.7 mb/d projected
2026Q4/Oct 2026  → BASELINE: Strait shipping normalizes to pre-war levels
Full Year 2026   → Commodity prices +16% y/y; Brent averages $86/bbl
Full Year 2027   → Commodity prices -12% y/y; Brent reverts to $70/bbl
```
